name: AIGril
description: AIGril virtual companion starring AIGL, with VRM avatar, FastAPI backend, and memory features.

scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k -s first -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "pnpm dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env AIGRIL_DESKTOP_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.desktop:package: pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis portable
scripts.desktop:package:win: pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis portable
scripts.desktop:package:linux: pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage deb tar.gz
scripts.desktop:package:mac:x64: pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg zip --x64
scripts.desktop:package:mac:arm64: pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.desktop:package:all: pnpm build && pnpm exec electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml -mwl
